headline: Data Centre Boom Consumes 2,400MW of Malaysian Electricity
context: Malaysia 85 operational data centres consumed 2,400MW in 2025 equivalent to 8% of Peninsula power demand.

cards.big: 85 data centres consume 2,400MW equalling 8% of Peninsula power
cards.sub: Rapid expansion strains electricity grid and raises sustainability concerns

cards.big: Johor hosts 28 centres consuming 950MW with 15 more under construction
cards.sub: TNB invested RM2.8 billion in grid upgrades for Johor corridor

cards.big: Only 22% of data centres use renewable energy for operations
cards.sub: Most rely on gas and coal power contradicting sustainability commitments

cards.big: Water consumption for cooling reached 45 million litres daily in 2025
cards.sub: Selangor water authority raised concerns about impact on residential supply

cards.big: Data centre growth tests whether digital infrastructure accounts for energy and water costs
2,400MW consumed by data centres. Malaysia's digital economy runs on energy — the source matters.
